titleStmt.title: SII 28.67: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 67. (A.R. No. 66 of 1913.) TIRUCHCHEṄGĀṬṬĀṄGUḌI, NANNILAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Uttarāpatīśvara temple, Gaṇapatīśvara shrine, north wall of the maṇḍapa in front.

Records that one birāmmaṇi (brāhmaṇi) Alliaṅgōdai-ammai ku . nilai purchased land of good grade (taram-peṟṟa) on the border of Tirumarugal on the terms of sabhai-vilai from several brahmins as also from . ttaṉūrkiḻavan Arayan Tiruvēkambam-uḍaiyāṉ alias Uḍaiya-māttāṇḍa-pallavarayaṉ to lay a pathway (tiru-vīti) for the procession of Chīrāḷa-ppiḷḷaiyār from the abode (tiru-māḷigai) of Chiṟuttoṇḍa-dēvar of Tiruchcheṅgāttaṅkuḍi to Tiru-marugal. It refers to the correction in the land-measurement made in the survey conducted in the 16th year of Chuṅgan-tavirttaruḷina Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-dēvar and the opādi-paḻa-viṟai on the land purchased. It is not clearly stated as to how this opādi was proposed to be discharged. However, the mention of a long list of Puravuvari-śrī-karaṇattu-mugaveṭṭi royal officers as signatories it appears that the opādi was exempted in respect of the land concerned (See below)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravartti
kaḷ maturai koṇṭu pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalai
yuṅ koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīkulottuṅka coḻa
tevarkku yāṇṭu ya 8 ḷ [ 3 100 3 10 ke]
ya māṇikkavaḷaṉāṭṭu marukalṉāṭṭut tirucceṅ
kāṭṭaṅkuṭic ciṟuttoṇṭatevar tirumāḷikai
yil niṉṟum cīrāḷappiḷḷaiyār tirumarukalukku Eḻu
ntaruḷum vaḻi tiruvītiyākac ceyya nīṅkalāka nīkki
ṉa nilattukku Uḷvarippaṭi keyamāṇikka
vaḷaṉāṭṭu marukalṉāṭṭu brahmateyam ti
10 8 ṉāl poṉ � ka
� niccayitta poṉ Anta 100000 4 10000 � rūpāy
Itaṉuḷ Iṉṉāṭṭut tirucceṅkāṭṭaṅkuṭiyil
ciṟuttoṇṭatevar tirumāḷikaiyil niṉṟum
cirāḷappiḷḷaiyār tirumarukalil Eḻuntaruḷum vaḻi tiruvī
tiyākac ceyya Ivvūril Ellaiyil Akappa
ṭṭa nilamāy kavucikaṉ kuṉikkumpirāṉ
ṭupaṭṭaṉum Ātittapaṭṭaṉum Āḻittervittaka
paṭṭaṉum kovinta m tevapaṭṭaṉum mā
ṭalaṉ tiruviṭaimarutu yāṉ koḷaripaṭṭa so
mayāciyārum tiruvuṭai yāṉ cavuripaṭṭaso
mayāciyārum kārttiya murtti tevapaṭṭaṉu
m tevarkaḷ tevappaṭṭa kavuṇiyaṉ kaṭal ciṟukā
ḷai tiruvaraṅka paṭṭaṉum ttaṉūr kiḻavaṉ Arayaṉ
tiruvekampamuṭaiyāṉāṉa Utaiyamāttāṇ
ṭappallavarayaṉum pakkal pirāmmaṇi Alliya
ṅkotaiyammai ku nilaiyum Ivaḷ sabhai
vilaiyuṅ koṇṭu nirvārttuk nilattuk
ku Ūrkkaṇakku marukaluṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttiṭ
ṭa kaṇakkuppaṭi nilamāy muṉṉu
ṭaiyārum Iṟaikaṭṭukkuṭalāy
varukiṟapaṭiyun tavirttu yāṇṭu 10 8� pa
cāṉa mutal nīṅkalāka nīkkiṉa taram peṟṟa
rūpāy sa Uṭaiyār cuṅkantavirttaru
ḷiṉa kulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku 10 1�
m Aḷakka kuṟainta nilattuopāti rūpāy 1dhi

la Opāti paḻaviṟai pon_ 4 1000 � niccayi
tta Opāti pon_ 2 1000 5 100 � 1 muntiri nikki rūpāy

Ivai puravari [śrī]karaṇanāyakamelūruṭaiyāṉeḻu
ttu Ivai puravari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi peruma
ṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Ivai puravari śrīkaraṇa
nāyakam perunallūruṭaiyāṉeḻattu Ivai
puravari śrīkaraṇanāyakam pālaiyūr kiḻavaṉeḻuttu
Ivai puravari śrīkaraṇanāyakam kuḻalūruṭaiyāṉe
ḻuttu Ivai puravari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi kumāramaṅ
kalamuṭaiyāṉeḻattu Ivai puravari śrīkaraṇattu
mu veṭṭi Uḻantaiyuṭaiyāṉe
ḻuttu Ivai puravariśrīkaraṇattu
mukaveṭṭi pantaṇainallūruṭai
yāṉeḻuttu Ivai co� ṉeḻuttu
Ivai paḻantīyarāja Ivai tī
pattaruyaṉeḻuttu raiyaṉe
ḻuttu Ivai ḻuttu Ivai
vicaiyarājaṉeḻuttu ṉāṭuṭaiyā
ṉeḻuttu ..
